problem id: 59a5bd7b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  00000000 -> 00000000
  01100100 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 11000000
  10010100 -> 00000000
  10010110 -> 10000000
  10011010 -> 00000001
  11100010 -> 00000000
  00001001 -> 00000000

query: 10011100
predicted answer: 00000001
